results.rendered_html: lalāṭa n. (later form of rarāṭa, q.v.) the forehead, brow,  AV.  &c. &c. (˚ṭe ind. on the forehead, in front; the destiny of every individual is believed by the Hindūs to be written by Brahmā on his forehead on the 6th day after birth See  RTL. 370 )
